name: Lisbon (Portugal)

colors.symbolism: the other half of the field

description: A vertically divided field of black (hoist) and white (fly), with the coat of arms of Lisbon centred on the division.
history: Lisbon is the capital and largest city of Portugal. Its flag is divided black and white per pale, with the city arms centred — including the ship of Saint Vincent flanked by ravens, recalling the legend of the city's patron saint.

features.role: Coat of arms of Lisbon (Ship of Saint Vincent flanked by ravens)
